summary: Iteration 35 - Multilingual System & Lottery Schedule Verification Complete. All 9 backend tests pass. French translations verified 100% (8/8 menu items). Lottery schedules display correctly with open/close times. Bet limits (min=1 HTG, max=999999 HTG) configurable by Company Admin. Configuration des Primes section displays all 6 prime fields correctly.

minor.issue: KeyError on blocked_numbers without 'number' field - FIXED

issues: Login page has hardcoded English text ('WELCOME', 'Sign in to your account') - should use i18n translations. Language switcher not present on login page.

action_items: Use i18n translations in LoginPage.js instead of hardcoded English text
critical_code_review_comments: LoginPage.js uses hardcoded English text instead of i18n translations - should use t('auth.welcomeBack'), t('auth.loginSubtitle'), etc.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All features working, minor login page translation issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Multilingual system fully tested. All 4 languages (FR, EN, HT, ES) have complete translation files. Language switcher works in app but not on login page. Lottery schedules display open/close times correctly. Bet limits configurable by Company Admin and synced to vendeur via /api/device/config.

details: All 4 translation files complete with 400+ keys each
Real-time language switching without page reload
Limits displayed in Nouvelle Vente form
Company Admin can configure via Settings page
All 6 prime fields displayed with correct values
Returns latest results and blocked numbers

bug_fix_applied.fix: Added check for 'number' field before accessing it
